feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Salient Features in B4HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to know where can we find these features in B4HANA system.

1) In BW 7.5, we have a feature in info package of "Color of Traffic light for an Empty request".

Where do we have this setting in DTP in B4 HANA?

2) In B4HANA, while activating Datamart datastore object, we have an option of " Activation with Zero elimination".

How to include this step in process chain?

entry.title: NEED TO CHANGE LAYOUT COHV WITH CONDITION
entry.content:
Hi,

how can I set the layout for the COHV transaction code with the condition to only display open CRTD, REL, and GMPS production orders .

expect receipted, and technically completed orders

entry.title: Hierarchies upload empty from BW4 into SAC
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We have defined an import model in SAP Analytics Cloud and defined it as "Analytic Measure" type.

Once it has been created, we have connected with BW4 through an import job and a query.

Our problem is that when we start to set up the import in the "Prepare Data" step we already see the hierarchy empty, even though we have selected it in the dimension selection panel:

Moreover, I checked the hierarchy with an Analysis for Office workbook's and its behaviour was as expected, correct.

The InfoObject related has the following option enabled:

and the following one on the query as well:

Are we doing anything bad? Why the hierarchy upload empty?

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: "Value 'EN' for dimension 'SPRAS' is not in a permitted value range" error in DTP
entry.content:
Am getting this error "Value 'EN' for dimension 'SPRAS' is not in a permitted value range" in DTP( We have filter selection in DTP with SPRAS = 'EN'). In DEC 2023, our non prod system is copied from PROD system so we are doing testing in non prod system by running process chains and correcting the error. Before copy changes, we are not getting this error and successfully completed loads in non prod system but after that only we are getting this error.

Could you please help us how to resolve this error.

entry.title: SAP BW 7.5 / Power BI SAP Business Warehouse application server connector
entry.content:
Dear All,

I’m using Power BI SAP Business Warehouse application server connector to bring data from a SAP BW BEx Query into Power BI. Everything was running smoothly until I added a specific dimension.

To simplify I’ve created the following example that brings 9 employees:

The issue happened after adding the dimension ZGTAP_CAP - employees 373886 and 272534 disappeared:


Looking at the listcube everything seems to be fine with employees 373886 and 272534:

Does anyone have a clue why adding this dimension is removing employees?

Thanks,

Frederico

entry.title: BW4 system copy
entry.content:
Hello,

is there a guideline to perform a BW4 system copy? Is SAP Note 886102 valid for a BW4 system?

Kind Regards

entry.title: Issue with Blocked Task List Runs in BW/4 HANA Migration - Seeking Solution
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am seeking guidance for a challenge we are facing during our migration to BW/4 HANA. We have encountered an issue with blocked task list runs, which were partially executed but cannot be completed. In an attempt to resolve this, I manually completed one of these runs in order to be able to delete it. However, now I am unable to delete it as the system insists it must be completed first, despite it already being manually completed. Further execution is also not possible since it's marked as completed.

This has become a critical issue as the blocked run is locking objects that need to be migrated. Is there a way to either properly complete or delete this run so that we can proceed with our migration? Any advice or solutions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Issue with Design Studio Persistencies During Transition to B4H Mode
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am facing an issue with Design Studio persistencies as we switch to B4H mode. When initiating the transition, the system reports a problem related to these persistencies, indicating that they are no longer supported in the BW/4HANA environment. However, I am unable to find these specific Design Studio extensions within the Design Studio, leaving me at a loss about how to address this issue.

I would greatly appreciate any insights or guidance on how to manage or resolve this problem with unsupported Design Studio persistencies during our transition to BW/4HANA. Tips on identifying and dealing with these specific objects or any alternative solutions would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance for your support and advice.

entry.title: Hello... Is there a way to get data load frequency for a list of data sources in BW?
entry.content: Is there a way to get data load frequency for a list of data sources in BW? For ex, for a given list of data sources I need to get data load schedules, could anyone suggest how can I get it please? I referred RSLDPIO, RSPCCHAIN, RSSELDONE, RSDS etc tables but not yet got clear direction.

entry.title: program ANALYZE_RSZ_TABLES , does an up-to-date documentation exist?
entry.content:
the only doc. I can find is from OSS-note : 792779 and dates from 2006 or so .

I'm currently cleaning up a BW7.5 system to get prepared for a move to BW4/Hana , but the program is generating issues that are not documented in the mentioned OSS-note ...

So is there a more up-to-date documentation available regarding program ANALYZE_RSZ_TABLE

entry.title: RFC Connection fail
entry.content:
We have created 2 systems in the SAP BW (Development and Testing). We also created RFC Connections to link these systems in order to transport the objects from the development to the Testing.

But when i try to do an authorization test, i end up getting the logging screen and an error after closing it.

I only have the SAP_ALL role without the transport-authorization.

Is that the reason why the connection fails?

entry.title: Connection between Development and Test systems
entry.content:
Hello Everybody, i am new to the SAP BW/4HANA world and hence i have some questions.

Till now i have been working on the BW development System which is connected to a SAP HANA Database.

A new empty Testing System have been created and i have to configure the environement and then created a connection between it and the development system to transport the objects.

1. Question:

- What is the recommended way to this procedure step by step?

2. Question:

I have been able to connect the Test System to the remote Testing Database through SDA. But when i try to the connect them using a Tenant-Database-Schema MDC, i am not able to find any Tenants to choose from.

Is there a reason for this?

Thank you for your time

entry.title: SAP BW - Inventory Data Load ADSO
entry.content:
Hello Guru's
Currently we have two data flows for inventory.. one is the old process through infocubes and recently we created new adso's dataflows.
My client wants to maintain both infocube data flow as well new adso dataflow .
Interms of data loading. The standard process
We will lock the users, clear the delta queues and load the infocube dataflow first.
For loading new dataflow to adso..
Should I run the Bx then bf and um ? If I do will the inventory totals through old dataflow through infocube is disrupted / will not match against ecc?

How to handle this data loading process??

Thank you very much.

entry.title: RFC to retrieve data from BW Composite Provider
entry.content:
Hi, all.

Which standard RFC can I use to retrieve data from BW/4HANA Composite Provider to an external software?

entry.title: InfoArea Package change
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 

i have an InfoArea with multiple ODS Views inside. Currently all of then are in the #TMP Package. When i do RSA1 and try to change the Package of the InfoArea only. i get the error:
"An internal error occurred during the authorization check"

Which Authorization do i need exactly here, in order to change the package of the InfoArea?

Thank you

entry.title: BCS/4HANA New function Direct Read
entry.content:
Hi all

With the BCS/4HANA as an add-on to SAP BW/4HANA, there is a new function called "Direct Read of Reported Data," as detailed in SAP Note 2743469 https://me.sap.com/notes/2743469/E.
This feature enables direct read access to arbitrary BW InfoProviders for reported financial data without data replication into the ADSO (Advanced DataStore Object) for totals records in BCS/4HANA.

My question is: Can we also execute a direct read from BW InfoProvider in S4 "BW Embedded" or from CDS Cube in S4 Embedded Analytics without any data replication to the BW system?

Additionally, is it possible to set up the direct read function with a virtual provider/ODS data model in BW? If so, what would the data model look like? Would it be ODS View → Direct read from BCS or ODS View → Replicate data in ADSO → Direct Read?

Thank you so much in advance.

entry.title: RFC Connection asking for Login
entry.content:
We have created 2 systems in the SAP BW (Development and Testing). We also created RFC Connections to link these systems in order to transport the objects from the development to the Testing.

But when i try to do an authorization test for TMSADM , i end up getting the logging screen and an error after closing it.

The same problem also happens when i try to activate and distribute in the STMS

entry.title: Ways to create persistent data in SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content: What are how we can create persistent data in SAP BW/4HANA?

entry.title: SAP BW Analysis Authorizations on the ADSO data?
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I would like to understand, if it is possible to have the SAP BW Analysis Authorization concept on the ADSO data i.e. without creating the Composite provider or query?

 

There is an external system connected to BW which directly access the ADSO tables to retrieve the data. It is required to enable the data authorizations on the ADSO data.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Transport from Development to 2 test Systems
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i have 1 Development System connected to 2 Test Systems.

I have transported all my objects to the first Test System successfuly. Now i need to transport all the objects once again to the second Test System.

When i try to do it, i get the error that the package is already assigned to the first Test System.

What is the best way to do this? 

I am aware of the Transportgroup, but i don't want to simultaneously transport objects to both systems because their purpose may differ in the future.
